#+title: Modelines
#+description: MASD-style org model for the three editor modelines injected into generated file headers: sql, c++, cmake. Each modeline is a leaf node under ores.modelines.emacs with a single content attribute carrying the emacs mode-line string.
#+type: codegen_config
